name: Iter10 — Developer Profile Page navigation and content
description: Verify that entering a GitHub username in the DeveloperSearch navbar widget navigates to /developer/:username and that the profile page shows the avatar, stats cards, Score History section, and either a reviews table or empty-state message.

planSteps.description: The navbar contains a text input with placeholder 'GitHub username…' and a 'View Profile' button
Type 'torvalds' into the GitHub username input in the navbar
A circular avatar image is visible on the page (its src URL contains 'torvalds.png' or 'github.com/torvalds')
The text '@torvalds' is displayed as the profile heading
A 'View on GitHub' link is visible on the page
A stat card labeled 'Total PRs Reviewed' is visible
A stat card labeled 'Average Score' is visible
A stat card labeled 'Approve Rate' is visible
A stat card labeled 'Most Recent Review' is visible
The heading 'Score History' is visible on the page
Either a reviews table with rows is visible OR the message 'No reviews found for @torvalds' is visible
